name: Oise (France)
description: Divided diagonally by a white band (per bend): the upper hoist bendy of yellow and blue, the lower fly blue strewn with yellow fleurs-de-lis.
history: The flag joins the bendy of Burgundy/Clermont with the fleur-de-lis field of France ancien, reflecting the department's historic counties.

features.role: bendy of yellow and blue at upper hoist
